description: Version bump to v7.4.0, update README.md, README_EN.md, docs/CHANGELOG.md with all new features. Add Dashboard screenshot placeholder in README.
steps: 1. In pyproject.toml: Change version from '7.3.0' to '7.4.0'.
2. In dashboard/app.py: Update the FastAPI app version to '7.4.0'. Update the Engine version display in index.html from 'v7.3.0' to 'v7.4.0'.
3. In dashboard/templates/base.html: Update the sidebar footer version from 'v7.3.1' to 'v7.4.0'.
4. In dashboard/templates/index.html: Update the status bar Engine version to 'v7.4.0'.

5. In README.md: Update the version badge from v7.3.1 to v7.4.0. Add a Dashboard screenshot placeholder section after the '30-second quickstart' with descriptive text explaining what the Dashboard shows (ASCII art box or markdown description saying 'Screenshot coming soon').
6. In README_EN.md: Same version badge update + screenshot placeholder.

7. In docs/CHANGELOG.md: Add a new v7.4.0 section at the top documenting all changes: Personas deep redesign, Backtest enhanced metrics, Settings completion, Signals filters, Global UX (theme toggle, progress bar, hover effects), Code robustness (error handling, health endpoint), Version bump.
8. git add and commit with message: 'docs: v7.4.0版本升级+README更新+CHANGELOG补全'
acceptance_criteria: README.md has v7.4.0 badge and screenshot placeholder
README_EN.md has v7.4.0 badge and screenshot placeholder
docs/CHANGELOG.md has v7.4.0 entry documenting all new features
verification: python -c "import importlib.metadata; v = importlib.metadata.version('augur-agents'); print('Version:', v); assert '7.4' in v"
findings: All 448 tests pass. Version 7.4.0 confirmed via importlib.metadata. app.py already had version 7.4.0 from FEAT-004. pyproject.toml updated from 7.3.0, base.html from v7.3.1, index.html from v7.3.0.
